title: Sanex Men Active Control Antiperspirant Roll-On Deodorant 6x50ml, 72 hour sweat protection, anti-odour, long-lasting dryness, freshness, gentle on skin, antibacterial, 0% alcohol*
features: ALL-DAY CONFIDENCE: Take on busy days with confidence while taking care of your underarm skin when you use Sanex Men Active Control Antiperspirant Roll-On Deodorant for men.
72-HOUR SWEAT PROTECTION: Our roll-on antiperspirant deodorant for men helps to keep you fresh and feeling confident with 48 hours of sweat protection.
6-IN-1: Our antiperspirant men's deodorant delivers an impressive 6-in-1 benefits, including odour neutralisation, anti-stains, long-lasting dryness, freshness, gentle on skin and antibacterial.
0% ALCOHOL: Our antiperspirant roll-on deodorant for men contains 0% alcohol*. (*Does not contain ethanol)
Certified by the British Skin Fountation, you can trust Sanex to help keep your skin performing at its healthy best.
description: Product Description Sanex Men Active Control Antiperspirant Roll-On Deodorant for men keeps you confident with 72-hour sweat protection & 6-in-1 benefits including gentle on skin, anti-odour, dryness, freshness & antibacterial. Safety Warning Stop using if irritation develops.
